title: Fancy Jukebox
description: This mod enhances the jukebox visuals by adding a spinning disk and more
body:
About The mod

This mod adds a spinning music disc and working tone-arm onto the jukebox to enhance the visuals of it

currently the disc color does not change depending on what disc is inserted, thats planned to be added tho

[Join my Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/mwCW7HNBWW)
